options.title: Life Sciences
courses: LIFESCI 7L - Introduction to Laboratory and Scientific Methodology

options.title: Mathematics
options.description: Students may select Life Sciences 40 or Statistics 13.

options.title: Ecology and Evolutionary Biology or Psychology
courses: EE BIOL 100 - Introduction to Ecology and Behavior

options.title: Psychology 115
options.description: Psychology 115 may be substituted with Psychology M117A, M117B, M117C. Students who complete Psychology M117A, M117B, M117C receive equivalent credit for course 115 and 10 units of upper-division psychobiology electives. All three courses must be completed to receive psychobiology elective credit.

options.title: Courses
courses: PSYCH 127B - Clinical Psychological Science: Biological Bases
PSYCH 127C - Clinical Psychological Science: Developmental Perspectives

options.title: Electives
options.description: Only one course from Ecology and Evolutionary Biology 112, 113A, or 114A may be applied. Only 4 units of Ecology and Evolutionary Biology 124A may be applied toward the major. Psychology 191CH may only be applied if content is approved by the undergraduate vice chair.
